title: Reset your password
body:
# Reset your password

If you've forgotten your password or need to reset it for security reasons:

1. Go to the login page and click **Forgot password**.
2. Enter the email address associated with your account.
3. Check your inbox for a reset link (valid for 30 minutes).
4. Click the link and choose a new password (at least 12 characters, one number, one symbol).
5. Log in with your new password.

If you don't receive the email within a few minutes, check your spam folder or contact support to verify your account email is correct.
